top_signals.title: Middle East peace deal could herald oil glut next year, says IEA
top_signals.summary: ‘Gradual’ return of flows will give way to sharp rise in production, outstripping forecasts for increased demand
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US and Iran sign deal as Trump vows to release frozen funds and ease sanctions
top_signals.summary: President says Tehran will receive incentives when they ‘behave’ and acknowledges it will keep ballistic missiles

top_signals.title: FirstFT: Lululemon apologises after Japanese drum controversy in China

top_signals.title: Pimco Favors Australian Bonds, Betting on Rate Cuts Next Year
top_signals.summary: Pacific Investment Management Co. is favoring five- to 10-year Australian debt, wagering the central bank will ultimately be forced to pivot to interest rate cuts to support a slowing economy.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Buying Cursor could be SpaceX’s Instagram moment
top_signals.summary: Elon Musk can learn from Mark Zuckerberg by refraining from too much meddling
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Warner warns of CISA cuts, staffing gaps in letter to acting chief
top_signals.summary: Warner on Tuesday also wrote a letter to DHS Secretary Markwayne Mullin, underscoring that DHS must prioritize CISA and pay for the MS-ISAC.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
